failures.description: The agent deviated from the required plan/tool-call constraints by searching all Jigsaw Puzzles instead of restricting the search to available items.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to find the cheapest available Jigsaw Puzzle. The agent understood the end goal, but at index 1 it planned a catalog search with available_only=false even though the availability constraint was already present in the user request. The expected action sequence should filter to available products, and no later step corrected this by issuing a filtered search.
